questions.question: HOTSPOT (Drag and Drop is not supported) To complete the sentence, select the appropriate option in the answer area.
questions.explanation: Descriptive analytics answers what happened in the past.
options: what is most likely to occur in the future.
which actions you can perform to affect outcomes.
why something occurred in the past.

questions.question: HOTSPOT (Drag and Drop is not supported) For each of the following statements, select Yes if the statement is true. Otherwise, select No. NOTE: Each correct selection is worth one point.
questions.explanation: Normalization reorganizes related tables; it does not eliminate relationships. It reduces duplication and improves integrity.

statements.text: Normalization involves eliminating relationships between database tables.
Normalizing a database reduces data redundancy.
Normalization improves data integrity.

questions.question: HOTSPOT (Drag and Drop is not supported) To complete the sentence, select the appropriate option in the answer area.
questions.explanation: ETL transforms the data before the Load step.
options: a matching schema in the data source and the data target.
a target data store powerful enough to transform data.
data that is fully processed before being loaded to the target data store.
that the data target be a relational database.
questions.correctAnswer: data that is fully processed before being loaded to the target data store.

questions.question: HOTSPOT (Drag and Drop is not supported) To complete the sentence, select the appropriate option in the answer area.
questions.explanation: Batch processing works on accumulated data, so some latency is normally acceptable.
options: data is always inserted one row at a time.
latency in delivering data processing results is acceptable.
questions.correctAnswer: latency in delivering data processing results is acceptable.

questions.question: HOTSPOT (Drag and Drop is not supported) To complete the sentence, select the appropriate option in the answer area.
questions.explanation: Transcribing audio uses AI speech recognition, which is a cognitive analytics capability.

questions.question: DRAG DROP (Drag and Drop is not supported) Match the types of analytics that can be used to answer the business questions. To answer, drag the appropriate analytics type from the column on the left to its question on the right. Each analytics type may be used once, more than once, or not at all. NOTE: Each correct match is worth one point.
questions.explanation: Diagnostic explains why, prescriptive recommends actions, and identifying named people is entity recognition, a cognitive AI task.

pairs.prompt: Why did sales increase last month?
How do I allocate my budget to buy different inventory items?
Which people are mentioned in a company's business documents?

questions.question: HOTSPOT (Drag and Drop is not supported) You have the following JSON document. Use the drop-down menus to select the answer choice that completes each statement based on the information presented in the JSON document. NOTE: Each correct selection is worth one point.
questions.explanation: The outer customer value is the root object; address is an object inside it; social media is an array of objects.

questions.question: HOTSPOT (Drag and Drop is not supported) You are reviewing the data model shown in the following exhibit. questions.explanation: Sales is the central fact table and Customer is a dimension, so the model is a star schema.

options: writes that have varying data structures.

questions.question: HOTSPOT (Drag and Drop is not supported) For each of the following statements, select Yes if the statement is true. Otherwise, select No. NOTE: Each correct selection is worth one point.
questions.explanation: Batch processing describes how data is processed, not a restriction on the destination. Its output can be written to file, relational, or NoSQL stores.

statements.text: Batch processing can output data to a file store.
Batch processing can output data to a relational database.
Batch processing can output data to a NoSQL database.

questions.question: DRAG DROP (Drag and Drop is not supported) Your company plans to load data from a customer relationship management (CRM) system to a data warehouse by using an extract, load, and transform (ELT) process. Where does data processing occur for each stage of the ELT process? To answer, drag the appropriate locations to the correct stages. Each location may be used once, more than once, or not at all. You may need to drag the split bar between panes or scroll to view content. NOTE: Each correct selection is worth one point.
questions.explanation: In ELT, data is extracted from the source, loaded into the target, and then transformed inside the target data warehouse.

questions.question: HOTSPOT (Drag and Drop is not supported) To complete the sentence, select the appropriate option in the answer area.
questions.explanation: Descriptive analytics summarizes what has already happened.

To answer, drag the appropriate visualization type from the column on the left to its description on the right. Each visualization type may be used once, more than once, or not at all. NOTE: Each correct match is worth one point.
questions.explanation: Each visual is matched to its standard Power BI use case.

pairs.prompt: Show quantities sold by product category as nested rectangles
Identify factors that affect a metric
Compare two numeric measures and identify correlation

questions.question: You need to create an Azure Storage account. Data in the account must replicate outside the Azure region automatically. Which two types of replication can you use for the storage account? Each correct answer presents a complete solution. NOTE: Each correct selection is worth one point.
questions.explanation: D: Azure Storage offers two options for copying your data to a secondary region: - Geo-redundant storage (GRS) - Geo-zone-redundant storage (GZRS) B: With GRS or GZRS, the data in the secondary region isn't available for read or write access unless there is a failover to the secondary region. For read access to the secondary region, configure your storage account to use read-access geo-redundant storage (RA-GRS) or read-access geo-zone-redundant storage (RA GZRS).

questions.question: HOTSPOT (Drag and Drop is not supported) For each of the following statements, select Yes if the statement is true. Otherwise, select No. NOTE: Each correct selection is worth one point.
questions.explanation: A warehouse integrates multiple sources and is optimized for analytical reads and historical data, not OLTP writes.

statements.text: A data warehouse can contain data from multiple sources.
A data warehouse is optimized for transactional writes.
A data warehouse normally stores only current operational data.

questions.question: Which statement is an example of Data Manipulation Language (DML)?
questions.explanation: Data Manipulation Language (DML) affect the information stored in the database. Use these statements to insert, update, and change the rows in the database. - BULK INSERT - DELETE - INSERT - SELECT - UPDATE - MERGE

questions.question: You have a SQL query that combines customer data and order data. The query includes calculated columns. You need to create a database object that would allow other users to rerun the same SQL query. What should you create?
questions.explanation: A view is a virtual table whose contents are defined by a query. A view acts as a filter on the underlying tables referenced in the view. The query that defines the view can be from one or more tables or from other views in the current or other databases.

questions.question: HOTSPOT (Drag and Drop is not supported) To complete the sentence, select the appropriate option in the answer area.
questions.explanation: Key/value stores are optimized for direct lookup by key.

questions.question: Match each data type to the most appropriate Azure data service.
questions.explanation: Blob stores image objects; Table storage is a key/value-style NoSQL service; Gremlin models relationships as graph edges.

pairs.explanation: Correct match: Azure Cosmos DB Gremlin API.

questions.question: DRAG DROP (Drag and Drop is not supported) Match the Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2 terms to the appropriate levels in the hierarchy. To answer, drag the appropriate term from the column on the left to its level on the right. Each term may be used once, more than once, or not at all. NOTE: Each correct match is worth one point.
questions.explanation: ADLS Gen2 hierarchy is resource group → storage account → container/file system → directories → files.

pairs.prompt: The level directly below an Azure resource group
The level directly below the storage account

questions.question: What are two characteristics of real-time data processing? Each correct answer presents a complete solution. NOTE: Each correct selection is worth one point.
questions.explanation: Real time processing deals with streams of data that are captured in real-time and processed with minimal latency to generate real-time (or near-real-time) reports or automated responses.
options: Data is processed as it is created
correctAnswers: Data is processed as it is created

questions.question: DRAG DROP (Drag and Drop is not supported) Match the Azure Data Factory components to the appropriate descriptions. questions.explanation: Datasets describe data, linked services describe connections, and pipelines orchestrate activities.

questions.question: DRAG DROP (Drag and Drop is not supported) Match the types of workloads to the appropriate scenarios. NOTE: Each correct match is worth one point.
questions.explanation: Time- or volume-triggered groups are batch; continuous event ingestion is streaming.

pairs.prompt: Online purchase events loaded in real time
Inventory updates loaded every one million transactions

questions.question: DRAG DROP (Drag and Drop is not supported) Your company plans to load data from a customer relationship management (CRM) system to a data warehouse by using an extract, load, and transform (ELT) process. You may need to drag the split bar between panes or scroll to view content. NOTE: Each correct selection is worth one point.
questions.explanation: In ELT, transformation runs after loading, inside the destination data warehouse.

pairs.explanation: Correct match: Infrastructure as a service (IaaS).
Correct match: Platform as a service (PaaS).

questions.explanation: Non-relational stores can use flexible schemas and different structures within the same collection.

questions.question: Which type of database is Azure Database for PostgreSQL?
Which storage solution supports access control lists (ACLs) at the file and folder level?
questions.explanation: Azure Data Lake Storage Gen2 implements an access control model that supports both Azure role-based access control (Azure RBAC) and POSIX-like access control lists (ACLs).

questions.question: What is a characteristic of batch processing?
options: The data ingested during batch processing must be processed as soon as the data is received.
Large datasets must be split into batches of less than 1 GB before the data can be processed.
There is a noticeable time delay between ingesting data and obtaining the data processing results.
Batch processing can only process data that is structured.
questions.correctAnswer: There is a noticeable time delay between ingesting data and obtaining the data processing results.

questions.question: HOTSPOT (Drag and Drop is not supported) Select the answer that correctly completes the sentence.
questions.explanation: MAX returns the greatest value and MIN the smallest.
